gcp.bigtableadmin.projects.instances.upd.description: Updates an instance within a project. This method updates only the display name and type for an Instance. To update other Instance properties, such as labels, use PartialUpdateInstance.

required.description: The unique name of the instance. Values are of the form `projects/{project}/instances/a-z+[a-z0-9]`.

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.bigtableadmin.projects.instances.list, iterate response["instances"][], extract item["name"] → fill {instanceId}
